blocks.text: Bø brothers and Lægreid enter Kontiolahti for the 20km individual
🎿 16:10 — Biathlon Men's 20km Individual: Bø, Lægreid and Tarjei Bø hunt gold in Kontiolahti
🏅 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony — the Winter Paralympics get underway
Kristoffer Reitan sits T7 at -4 after two rounds in Florida — five shots behind leader Smotherman. Form is there; a weekend charge is entirely possible.
